blurb: AI-enabled drug-discovery company. Launch coverage uses first-party scientific/publication material as verified evidence; no controversy invented.

publications.title: Artificial intelligence in drug discovery
publications.summary: BenevolentAI hosts a publication/commentary on artificial intelligence in drug discovery, reflecting on AI/ML methods, their relevance across drug discovery and the need to manage expectations.

news.title: BenevolentAI unveils major strategic overhaul with return to original mission
news.summary: BenevolentAI announced a restructuring back to its core AI-enabled drug-discovery mission, a durable corporate signal for its London AI footprint.

news.title: Proposed Delisting via Merger of BenevolentAI into Osaka Holdings S.à r.l. and Publication of Notice of Extraordinary General Meeting
news.summary: BenevolentAI proposed delisting from Euronext Amsterdam via merger into Osaka Holdings, an official filing-style corporate action.

news.title: EGM Results announcement
news.summary: BenevolentAI reported shareholder approval of the delisting and restructuring resolutions at its extraordinary general meeting.
